zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Guth於1600年之前出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾洛斯時，她的父親Valentin Guth25歲，母親Marie Lecomte19歲。她和Simon Charton至少有1個兒子。她去世於1683年9月24日在法國巴-爾洛斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie Guth于1600年之前出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾洛斯时，她的父亲Valentin Guth25岁，母亲Marie Lecomte19岁。她和Simon Charton至少有1个儿子。她去世于1683年9月24日在法国巴-爾洛斯。

nameMeanings.name: Guth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Fritz, Gerhard, Erwin, Heinz, Otto, Reinhold, Siegfried, Wilhelm.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German guot ‘good’ or ‘capable’, German and Yiddish gut. This may be a nickname, but in the Middle Ages the term also denoted a freeman or a vassal of noble birth, and the surname may be a status name from this sense. As a Jewish surname it is often artificial. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and Czechia. Compare Gut and Good .
History: This is the name of a (Swiss) German Mennonite family, among the Mennonites in the US established mainly in the Americanized form   Good  .

variants.name: Gut
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Franciszek, Irena, Jozef, Krystian, Krystyna, Ludwik, Wojciech.  German Erwin, Hans, Hertha, Urs.  Jewish Moshe, Shai.
Swiss German, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Guth  . Compare   Gutmann  .
Polish: of German origin (see   Guth  , compare 1 above).

variants.name: Bonus
meanings: German: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of Guth or Gut ‘good’, from Latin bonus.
Polish; Czech (Bonuš): from a pet form of the personal name Polish Bonifacy, Czech Bonifác (see Boniface ).

variants.name: Guthmiller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Reinhold, Milbert, Otto.
Americanized form of German Guthmüller, a nickname or distinguishing name from Middle High German guot ‘good’ (see Guth ) + mūler ‘miller’.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

historicEvents.description: Reigns of Louis XIII and Louis XIV. Royal power at its peak. France dominates Europe, French culture spreads. Start of large-scale sea trade.

historicEvents.title: 30 Years War
historicEvents.description: Ferdinand II was trying to force the people to follow Catholicism. The 30 years war was a battle of religion with the Protestants and Catholics, in the Holy Roman Empire.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Guth was born before 1600, in Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, her father, Valentin Guth, was 25 and her mother, Marie Lecomte, was 19. She had at least 1 son with Simon Charton. She died on 24 September 1683, in Russ, Bas-Rhin, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Guth est née avant 1600, à Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Valentin Guth, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marie Lecomte, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Simon Charton. Elle est décédée le 24 septembre 1683, à Russ, Bas-Rhin, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Guth vor 1600 in Russ, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Valentin Guth 25 und ihre Mutter Marie Lecomte 19. Sie hatte mit Simon Charton mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. September 1683 in Russ, Bas-Rhin, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Guth è nata il prima del 1600 nel Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, sua padre, Valentin Guth, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Marie Lecomte, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Simon Charton. Morì il 24 settembre 1683, nel Russ, Bas-Rhin, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Guthが1600年以前にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンルスで生まれた時，父Valentin Guthは25歳，母Marie Lecomteは19歳であった。彼女はSimon Chartonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1683年9月24日にフランスバス-ルヒンルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie Guth(이)가 1600년 이전 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 러스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Valentin Guth(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie Lecomte(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Simon Charton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1683년 9월 24일 프랑스 바스-히 러스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Guth nasceu antes 1600, em Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Valentin Guth, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marie Lecomte, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Simon Charton. Ela faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1683, em Russ, Bas-Rhin, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Guth родилась перед 1600 г. в местности расс, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, её отцу по имени Valentin Guth было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie Lecomte, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Simon Charton. Она умерла 24 сентября 1683 г. в местности расс, бас-рин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie Guth nació antes de 1600, en Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Valentin Guth, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Marie Lecomte, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Simon Charton. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1683, en Russ, Bas-Rhin, Francia.
